results.title: JavaScript Course for Beginners – Your First Step to Web Development
results.reason: Mosh is widely praised in comments for his 'clean code' approach and logical progression from variables to functions, making it the gold standard for absolute beginners.
summary: Learn how to set up your coding environment
Understand how to use variables and constants
Master basic data types like strings and numbers
Write your first simple programs using basic logic

results.title: JavaScript tutorial for beginners 🌐
results.reason: Viewer appreciation highlights the step-by-step setup of the environment, which is crucial for beginners starting from zero.
summary: Discover how to display messages on a webpage
Learn to take input from a website user
Perform basic math operations using simple code
Understand how to change text on a screen

results.title: JavaScript Visualized - Event Loop, Web APIs, (Micro)task Queue
results.reason: Exceptional visual teaching quality for the 'core' engine, but the topic (Event Loop) is often too advanced for a day-one beginner.
summary: See how the browser handles multiple tasks at once
Learn how code waits for its turn to run
Understand how the computer manages timed events
Visualize how data moves through the hidden system

results.title: Lecture 5: Functions & Methods | JavaScript Full Course
results.reason: Excellent depth on specific core concepts like functions, though the channel often mixes English with Hindi, which may affect the language preference score.
summary: Learn to group code into reusable blocks
Understand how to pass information into functions
Master ways to perform actions on lists of data
Write cleaner code that is easier to read

results.title: 100+ JavaScript Concepts you Need to Know
results.reason: While highly popular, the rapid-fire pace is noted in comments as being better for review than for a beginner's first exposure to the core.
summary: Get a quick overview of modern coding tools
Learn the vocabulary used by professional developers
Understand how different parts of the language connect
Discover advanced features in a very short time
